title: DPI char * not working
body:
Hi
    DPI with parameter char array failed to compile, please help, thanks

```
import "DPI-C" function void profile (input char *str);
```

```
verilator --coverage-line --prof-cfuncs --trace --trace-coverage -Wall --cc --exe --build src/sim_main.cpp src/quantr_i_main.v -Isrc
%Error: src/quantr_dpi.h:1:50: syntax error, unexpected '*', expecting ')'
    1 | import "DPI-C" function void profile (input char *str);
      |                                                  ^
        src/quantr_i_main.v:3:1: ... note: In file included from quantr_i_main.v
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
make: *** [all] Error 1
```
